description: Black-box test plan for runie CLI and TUI, covering UI parity, replay fixtures, error states, and onboarding.

tasks.title: Keyboard shortcuts overlay
tasks.grok_feature: Ctrl+X searchable shortcuts overlay with expandable categories
tasks.acceptance_summary: Overlay opens, lists bindings, supports search/filter, closes with Esc, and is reachable from main chat.

tasks.title: Command palette navigation
tasks.grok_feature: Ctrl+P / searchable command palette with categories
tasks.acceptance_summary: Palette opens with / and Ctrl+P, filters, arrow/Tab/Shift+Tab move selection, Enter runs, Esc closes.

tasks.title: Input composition
tasks.grok_feature: Bottom input box with multiline and history shortcuts
tasks.acceptance_summary: Typing, multiline (Shift+Enter/Ctrl+J), special chars/unicode, empty submit, cursor movement work.

tasks.title: Model switching
tasks.grok_feature: /model picker with current model marked and recent models
tasks.acceptance_summary: Model picker opens, arrows/Tab select, Enter confirms, status bar updates, current model is marked.

tasks.title: Tool permission dialog
tasks.grok_feature: Edit permission dialog with Always / session / once / deny options
tasks.acceptance_summary: Dialog shows 4 options, number keys 1-4 select, arrows/Tab navigate, persistence matches chosen scope.

tasks.title: Turn lifecycle
tasks.grok_feature: User message, streaming response, thought blocks, cancel, turn completed marker
tasks.runie_feature: Agent turn loop with mock provider
tasks.acceptance_summary: Message appears, response streams, cancels with Ctrl+C, turn-complete marker shown, follow-up accepted.

tasks.title: Tool output rendering
tasks.grok_feature: Collapsible tool blocks with titles like 'List .', 'Creating file', output inside
tasks.acceptance_summary: Tool calls render as collapsible blocks with Grok-style headings; output/diffs visible; denied calls show denial.

tasks.title: Status bar
tasks.grok_feature: Top status shows model, token usage, state, timing
tasks.acceptance_summary: Status line shows model, token/context usage, idle/waiting/completed/error state, and timing.

tasks.title: Core mock provider loop
tasks.acceptance_summary: Mock provider starts, echoes input, list_dir fixture invokes tool permission and shows directory contents.

tasks.title: Chat scrollback
tasks.grok_feature: Tab focuses scrollback, arrows/PageUp/PageDown scroll, Esc returns to input
tasks.acceptance_summary: Tab moves focus to scrollback, arrows/pages scroll, Esc returns focus to input.

tasks.title: Session management
tasks.acceptance_summary: New session clears chat, save/load/resume/list work, keyboard nav in session list.

tasks.title: Settings dialog
tasks.acceptance_summary: Settings opens, arrow/Tab navigate categories and fields, toggles update state, Esc closes.

tasks.title: Provider management
tasks.acceptance_summary: Provider picker navigable, invalid key handled, provider can be added/disconnected.

tasks.title: Slash commands
tasks.acceptance_summary: / opens command palette filtered to commands, description shown, execution leaves no stray slash.

tasks.title: File references
tasks.acceptance_summary: @ triggers file hints/completion, attached file appears in context, no @! support required.

tasks.title: Startup and onboarding
tasks.grok_feature: Welcome screen, project directory prompt, provider picker, Ctrl+Q quit
tasks.acceptance_summary: Onboarding dialog is keyboard navigable and blocking until configured; Ctrl+Q quits from idle.

tasks.title: Onboarding close guard
tasks.acceptance_summary: Esc, text quit commands, and Cancel do not close onboarding until a provider and model are selected; Ctrl+Q still quits.

tasks.title: Black-box replay testing harness
tasks.acceptance_summary: Standalone runie-tests crate builds runie from submodule, replays SSE fixtures through runie-cli and runie-tui, and runs deterministic smoke tests without API keys, network calls, or runie crate imports.

tasks.title: Black-box replay test DSL
tasks.runie_feature: Ergonomic Rust DSL for CLI/TUI replay tests
tasks.acceptance_summary: DSL exposes test_cli() / test_tui() builders, predicate assertions, multi-turn fixture chaining, and tmux pane capture with isolated temp HOME.

tasks.title: CLI replay conversations
tasks.runie_feature: CLI driven by recorded SSE fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: CLI tests replay single-turn, multi-turn, tool-call, and reasoning fixtures and assert on stdout, JSON output, and exit codes without API keys.

tasks.title: runie-tests isolation contract
tasks.acceptance_summary: AGENTS.md, README.md, EXECUTE.md, docs/black-box-replay-testing.md, and task files state the isolation contract: no runie crate imports, no API keys at test runtime, temp HOME, sanitized XDG_*, and accepted dependencies (submodule, tmux, Rust toolchain).

tasks.title: TUI replay conversations
tasks.runie_feature: TUI driven by recorded SSE fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: TUI tmux tests replay single-turn, multi-turn, tool-call, and reasoning fixtures and assert on streamed output, tool blocks, and thinking blocks.

tasks.title: Error state rendering
tasks.runie_feature: Error banners and non-zero exit codes
tasks.acceptance_summary: CLI and TUI render invalid API keys, provider errors, replay error fixtures, and missing fixtures gracefully without leaking secrets.

tasks.title: Recorded trace coverage
tasks.acceptance_summary: All 131 recorded SSE fixtures under runie-tests/fixtures/ are wired by CLI and TUI replay tests; fixture-coverage reports 0 unwired fixtures.

tasks.title: Wire Anthropic stream_error_mid_response fixture
tasks.acceptance_summary: tests/cli_replay.rs contains anthropic_stream_error_mid_response_renders, referencing fixtures/anthropic/stream_error_mid_response.sse, asserting non-zero exit and readable error output; fixture-coverage reports 0 unwired fixtures.

tasks.title: Add OpenAI-compatible error SSE fixtures
tasks.runie_feature: Recorded SSE error fixtures for OpenAI protocol
tasks.acceptance_summary: All OpenAI-protocol error fixtures (rate limit, server error, stream error, context length, model not found, invalid key) exist under runie-tests/fixtures/openai/ and are parseable.

tasks.title: Add Anthropic-compatible error SSE fixtures
tasks.runie_feature: Recorded SSE error fixtures for Anthropic protocol
tasks.acceptance_summary: All Anthropic-protocol error fixtures (rate limit, server error, stream error, context length, invalid key) exist under runie-tests/fixtures/anthropic/ and are parseable.

tasks.title: Wire error SSE fixtures to CLI replay tests
tasks.runie_feature: CLI black-box tests for provider SSE errors
tasks.acceptance_summary: tests/cli_replay.rs covers every OpenAI and Anthropic SSE error fixture with non-zero exit and readable error assertions, including anthropic_stream_error_mid_response_renders.

tasks.title: Wire error SSE fixtures to TUI replay tests
tasks.runie_feature: TUI black-box tests for provider SSE errors
tasks.acceptance_summary: tests/tui_replay_conversations.rs covers every OpenAI and Anthropic SSE error fixture with pane assertions and recovery tests.

tasks.title: Add HTTP-status error replay support and black-box tests
tasks.runie_feature: HTTP-level provider error simulation in replay tests
tasks.acceptance_summary: Replay provider can simulate 429/500/502/503/401/403 HTTP responses for both protocols; CLI and TUI tests cover each status.

tasks.title: Add error recovery and retry behavior black-box tests
tasks.runie_feature: Verified retry and recovery behavior in CLI/TUI
tasks.acceptance_summary: Black-box tests prove transient errors are retried with backoff, non-retryable errors fail fast, and the TUI accepts input after an error.

tasks.title: Remove test sleep calls
tasks.acceptance_summary: No sleep() calls remain in tests or TUI DSL; all waits are state-based.

tasks.title: Convert TUI replay tests to real fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: tests/tui_replay_conversations.rs uses recorded SSE fixtures for all scenarios instead of mock echo responses.

tasks.title: Unify CLI replay tests around the DSL
tasks.acceptance_summary: CLI replay and error tests use test_cli().fixture(...).args(...).assert() and no longer spawn processes manually.

tasks.title: TUI DSL polling waits
tasks.runie_feature: Fast polling waits in TUI DSL
tasks.acceptance_summary: TUI DSL replaces sleeps with wait_for_text, wait_for_idle, and wait_for_no_text polling helpers.

tasks.title: DSL permission dialog helpers
tasks.acceptance_summary: DSL provides request_tool_permission, expect_permission_dialog, allow/deny helpers and AGENTS.md documents them.

tasks.title: DSL response assertions
tasks.acceptance_summary: response_contains / expect_response helper exists in DSL and duplicated helpers are removed from test files.

tasks.title: DSL selected row helpers
tasks.acceptance_summary: DSL provides expect_selected_row and expect_selection_glyphs helpers for dialogs and pickers.

tasks.title: Consolidate redundant tests
tasks.acceptance_summary: Duplicate echo, permission, turn lifecycle, and follow-up tests are merged into canonical files without losing coverage. Sequential-submit tests merged.

tasks.title: Strengthen status-bar assertions
tasks.acceptance_summary: Status-bar tests assert on specific model name (mock/echo), response appearing, timing format (digits+unit), and model remains visible. All tests use MEDIUM_TIMEOUT.

tasks.title: Centralize test timeouts
tasks.acceptance_summary: Shared timeout constants (SHORT/MEDIUM/LONG/VERY_LONG) replace magic durations in all tests. Default TimeoutConfig: startup=10s, response=5s, idle=1s, dialog=3s.

tasks.title: Reorganize input composition tests
tasks.runie_feature: Input composition tests in dedicated file
tasks.acceptance_summary: Input composition tests live in tests/input_composition.rs. mock_echo.rs retains only cursor-editing tests (Ctrl+K). Duplicates removed.

tasks.title: Tighten error state assertions
tasks.acceptance_summary: Sequential-submit tests merged into sequential_submits_produce_distinct_responses. Error patterns tightened from broad alternations to specific strings.

tasks.title: Rename misleading test files
tasks.acceptance_summary: Test file names reflect whether they use mock or replay fixtures.

tasks.title: Remove duplicated fixture and temp-home helpers
tasks.acceptance_summary: No local fixture_path() or temp_home() helpers remain in tests; all use DSL helpers.

tasks.title: DSL harness timeouts
tasks.runie_feature: Unified timeout layer in black-box DSL
tasks.acceptance_summary: Every blocking DSL operation has a default timeout from a single TimeoutConfig; no test can hang forever and timeouts report the operation plus last pane content.

tasks.title: Improve test execution speed
tasks.acceptance_summary: Session reuse via shared_mock_app() and static OnceLock per test file; binary path caching with OnceLock; tight TimeoutConfig defaults; no sleep() calls; pre-built binary detection via RUNIE_BIN/RUNIE_CLI_BIN.

tasks.title: Newline key aliases
tasks.acceptance_summary: Ctrl+Enter and Alt+Enter insert a newline in the chat input while existing newline bindings continue to work.

tasks.title: Undo and redo commands
tasks.acceptance_summary: /undo reverts the last turn and its file edits; /redo re-applies a previously undone turn. 12 tests covering palette, basic undo/redo, edge cases, and palette execution.

tasks.title: Dialog numeric selection
tasks.acceptance_summary: Pressing 1-4 in permission dialogs selects options directly; model picker does not use number selection; invalid digits (0, 9) are ignored.

tasks.title: @-mention ranking and fallback
tasks.acceptance_summary: @-mention completion boosts recently used files, shows a clear empty state, and refreshes asynchronously when fff results arrive. 10 tests.

tasks.title: Approval dialog preview and feedback
tasks.acceptance_summary: Permission dialogs support Ctrl+E full-screen preview and a reject-with-feedback option. 9 tests.

tasks.title: Dialog navigation
tasks.runie_feature: Consistent keyboard navigation across all dialog types
tasks.acceptance_summary: All 15 dialog navigation scenarios (form tabs, list panel arrows/Tab, UP recalls history in empty input, UP does not affect chat in dialogs) implemented in tests/dialog_navigation.rs. Session reuse intentionally disabled in this file.

tasks.title: Visible message queue indicator
tasks.runie_feature: Queued message count in status bar
tasks.acceptance_summary: The status bar shows the number of queued follow-up messages during an active turn. 9 tests.

tasks.title: Automatic config reload
tasks.runie_feature: Watch config files and reload automatically
tasks.acceptance_summary: Runie reloads keybindings, theme, and provider config when config files change, without requiring /reload. 14 tests.

tasks.title: Status command
tasks.acceptance_summary: /status opens a dialog showing current model, provider, thinking level, permission mode, trust state, queued count, and context usage. Tests exist but are #[ignore] pending runie feature implementation.

tasks.title: TUI history-loaded event handling
tasks.acceptance_summary: UiActor branches on Event::HistoryLoaded and forwards it to InputActor as InputMsg::HistoryLoaded. up_arrow_recalls_persisted_history_in_empty_input passes.

tasks.title: Compact command
tasks.acceptance_summary: /compact summarizes older turns to reduce context usage, with a preview and confirmation step. 8 tests.

tasks.title: Session title and markdown export
tasks.acceptance_summary: /title renames the current session; /export-md exports the transcript as Markdown. 10 tests.

tasks.title: Auto-approve mode
tasks.acceptance_summary: A two-level permission mode (manual/auto) is surfaced in the status bar; auto mode approves regular tools automatically with confirmation. 7 tests.

tasks.title: Large-paste placeholder
tasks.acceptance_summary: Large pastes collapse into a [Pasted Text: N lines] placeholder; second paste expands; send expands automatically. 11 tests.

tasks.title: Context-aware tool output toggle
tasks.acceptance_summary: Ctrl+O toggles the focused tool output block when a tool is selected, otherwise toggles global tool-output density. 9 tests.

tasks.title: Single binary for CLI and TUI modes
tasks.acceptance_summary: A single binary launches the TUI by default and enters CLI mode when non-interactive flags are provided. 8 tests.

tasks.title: Wire remaining Anthropic MiniMax fixtures
tasks.runie_feature: Replay coverage for MiniMax m2.5, m2.7, m3 fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: All MiniMax fixtures (m2.5 simple/tool, m2.7 multi_tool/reasoning, m3 multi_tool + all multi-turn) are wired by CLI and TUI replay tests.

tasks.title: Wire remaining Anthropic Qwen fixtures
tasks.runie_feature: Replay coverage for Qwen3.5-plus, Qwen3.6-plus, Qwen3.7-max, Qwen3.7-plus fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: All Qwen fixtures (qwen3.5_plus, qwen3.6_plus, qwen3.7_max all variants, qwen3.7_plus all variants) are wired by CLI and TUI replay tests.

tasks.title: Wire remaining OpenAI DeepSeek multi-turn fixtures
tasks.runie_feature: Replay coverage for DeepSeek v4 flash/pro multi-turn fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: All DeepSeek v4 flash and v4 pro multi-turn fixtures (clarification, math_chain, weather_chain, multi_tool_then_compare, read_summarize_followup, reasoning_followup) are wired.

tasks.title: Wire remaining OpenAI GLM fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: All GLM fixtures (glm_5, glm_5.1, glm_5.2 all variants including multi-turn) are wired by CLI and TUI replay tests.

tasks.title: Wire remaining OpenAI Kimi fixtures
tasks.runie_feature: Replay coverage for Kimi k2.6 and k2.7-code fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: All Kimi fixtures (k2.6 tool/reasoning/multi_tool + multi-turn, k2.7_code simple/tool) are wired by CLI and TUI replay tests.

tasks.title: Wire remaining OpenAI Mimo fixtures
tasks.runie_feature: Replay coverage for Mimo v2.5 and v2.5-pro fixtures
tasks.acceptance_summary: All Mimo fixtures (v2.5 simple/tool/multi_tool/reasoning, v2.5_pro simple/tool) are wired by CLI and TUI replay tests.

tasks.title: Fixture coverage report
tasks.acceptance_summary: A `just fixture-coverage` command lists every SSE fixture and the test(s) that cover it, outputs Markdown and JSON reports, and groups coverage by protocol, model, scenario, and error category.

tasks.title: Unify replay TUI harness with AppTest
tasks.runie_feature: Shared session/wait logic for mock and replay TUI tests
tasks.acceptance_summary: TuiTest in src/tui.rs delegates tmux session lifecycle, key sending, and waits to the AppTest/TmuxSession layer; single-fixture replay tests share a session per test file and all replay TUI tests pass.

tasks.title: Per-test tmux sockets
tasks.runie_feature: Isolated tmux socket per test session
tasks.acceptance_summary: Every tmux command uses a per-test `-S <socket>` pointing to /tmp/runie-tests-<pid>/socket/<name>.sock; socket directory is cleaned by the justfile before each run, solving the std::process::exit static-dtor leak. TmuxSession, MockSessionCache::Drop, AppTest::kill_session, and AppTest::Drop all pass the socket path.
